title: Who is the cutest Evangelion character
display_title: Who is the cutest Evangelion character
wikitext:
[]: Who is the cutest Evangelion character?             Quote Post by Collossus » Sun Jul 07, 2013 9:18 pm Of course all of them are cute. But I think Rei and Kaworu are the cutest because of their non-human aspects. Who do you think is the cutuest?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Jul 07, 2013 9:37 pm End of thread  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Excess_Velocity » Sun Jul 07, 2013 9:38 pm Rei is the kawaii-st, because dat haircut dat naivete dat blank stare and most of all SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ænimal » Sun Jul 07, 2013 9:41 pm definitely Pen 2

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Jul 07, 2013 9:54 pm There can be only one. Queen of Love and Beauty  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Jul 07, 2013 9:55 pm @TMBounty_Hunter Nailed it. No discussion.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Sun Jul 07, 2013 10:08 pm Once again, the absence of the Class Rep from discussions such as this, saddens me.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Sun Jul 07, 2013 10:11 pm Sachiel. Second place goes to Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Dovah » Sun Jul 07, 2013 10:13 pm Adam. He looks absolutely radiant.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jul 07, 2013 10:27 pm Man, you guys suck at spelling. it's M A Y A. Maya. Obviously.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Jul 07, 2013 11:20 pm Shinji's "Thermal Expansion"

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Jul 07, 2013 11:33 pm Adding my vote to PenPen. He's a freaking penguin, what more needs to be said?

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Sun Jul 07, 2013 11:54 pm Rei 1 is adorable Sakura is cute too.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Jul 08, 2013 12:04 am SimplyMason0 wrote: Sakura is cute too.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 08, 2013 1:14 am BC Baron wrote: Once again, the absence of the Class Rep from discussions such as this, saddens me.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 08, 2013 2:44 am riffraff11235 wrote: Agreed. If there's any human capable of competing with Pen**2(*), it's Sakura. Today on 'Stretching with Sakura'  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Mon Jul 08, 2013 2:52 am Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Mon Jul 08, 2013 4:10 am Misato, because she's my mommy. Then I can't decide between Kaji and Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Jul 08, 2013 4:22 am A certain bird, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Jul 08, 2013 5:09 am Sgt. Griff wrote: Gendo.
